'''âp-y-b-p''' ('''kapaybepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:photochop|photochop]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-y-b-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:photochop|photochop]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-y-b-p
|-
! Lemma
| kapaybepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipaybepoko|thipaybepoko]] || [[word:jipaybepoko|jipaybepoko]] || [[word:shipaybepoko|shipaybepoko]] || [[word:kipaybepoko|kipaybepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupaybepoko|thuthupaybepoko]] || [[word:jujupaybepoko|jujupaybepoko]] || [[word:shushupaybepoko|shushupaybepoko]] || [[word:kukupaybepoko|kukupaybepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupaybepoko|thupaybepoko]] || [[word:jupaybepoko|jupaybepoko]] || [[word:shupaybepoko|shupaybepoko]] || [[word:kupaybepoko|kupaybepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupaybepoko|thupaybepoko]] || [[word:jupaybepoko|jupaybepoko]] || [[word:shupaybepoko|shupaybepoko]] || [[word:kupaybepoko|kupaybepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepaybepoko|thepaybepoko]] || [[word:jepaybepoko|jepaybepoko]] || [[word:shepaybepoko|shepaybepoko]] || [[word:kepaybepoko|kepaybepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopaybepoko|thothopaybepoko]] || [[word:jojopaybepoko|jojopaybepoko]] || [[word:shoshopaybepoko|shoshopaybepoko]] || [[word:kokopaybepoko|kokopaybepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopaybepoko|thopaybepoko]] || [[word:jopaybepoko|jopaybepoko]] || [[word:shopaybepoko|shopaybepoko]] || [[word:kopaybepoko|kopaybepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopaybepoko|thopaybepoko]] || [[word:jopaybepoko|jopaybepoko]] || [[word:shopaybepoko|shopaybepoko]] || [[word:kopaybepoko|kopaybepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠpaybepoko|thĂŠpaybepoko]] || [[word:jĂŠpaybepoko|jĂŠpaybepoko]] || [[word:shĂŠpaybepoko|shĂŠpaybepoko]] || [[word:kĂŠpaybepoko|kĂŠpaybepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapaybepoko|thathapaybepoko]] || [[word:jajapaybepoko|jajapaybepoko]] || [[word:shashapaybepoko|shashapaybepoko]] || [[word:kakapaybepoko|kakapaybepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapaybepoko|thapaybepoko]] || [[word:japaybepoko|japaybepoko]] || [[word:shapaybepoko|shapaybepoko]] || [[word:kapaybepoko|kapaybepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapaybepoko|thapaybepoko]] || [[word:japaybepoko|japaybepoko]] || [[word:shapaybepoko|shapaybepoko]] || [[word:kapaybepoko|kapaybepoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
